{"id": "583162", "storeId": 92, "shoppingContext": null, "fullDisplayName": "CAFE Ol\u00e9 by H-E-B Texas Pecan Medium Roast Ground Coffee", "productDescription": "Ground from 100% Arabica beans, CAFE Ol\u00e9 by H-E-B Texas Pecan coffee is medium-bodied and brimming with the flavor of caramel and pecans. An aromatic treat as it brews, this medium roast blend is perfect for making a big pot or just a single cup with a reusable coffee pod filter.

• One 12 oz bag of ground coffee
• Medium Roast and medium bodied
• Texas Pecan: Creamy caramel and Texas pecan flavors
